历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20960 → 23964 → 24124 → 18050, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2025, it notably moved forward to about 18050, a forward shift of about 6000 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 18050. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 12 in 2021, 11 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 15 (including 2 for medical categories), a 200% expansion compared to 2025, greatly easing competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift backward significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, showing a slight rise, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving controversies such as fan interference in the CUVA men's volleyball finals (26 records, 11 negative, 15 neutral), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors offered in Physics Category, Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category (socially hot), while Sports Rehabilitation and Sports Human Science belong to the medical/rehabilitation category (stable popularity). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition. The undergraduate batch cutoff for Physics Category in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, reflecting a loosening of overall score lines. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, representing cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the 200% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, an 8.4% increase in local Physics Category examinees, and a slightly negative reputation, the competition relief effect from expansion is most significant. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward notably compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 39810, with a range of 39310–40310.
